name: Stacey Abrams
subject: We grew up steeped in Georgia's history of civil rights activism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
This is our time. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa788/34a064cc/32dfeef/70c848f/1175210010/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Brothers and sisters, My parents had to fight for their right to vote in the Jim Crow South. As a teenager, my dad was arrested for helping Black folks register to vote. My mother posted his bail. Now, their daughter is running for Governor of Georgia. _Let that sink in for a moment._ This journey wasn't easy. Generations of hard work - most of which went unrecognized - have culminated in this moment, right now. I'll be frank: We are running against an opponent who believes that voting is a privilege and not a right. Who believes that only those with money deserve quality health care, a good education, and safe communities. And whose campaign is propped up by wealthy Republican donors who will do _anything_ to maintain power in Georgia. But we grew up steeped in Georgia's history of civil rights activism. We were taught to fight for what we believe in by generations of leaders who came before us, including our own parents and grandparents. So we will not back down. _This is our time_. Our future is worth fighting for. We are ready. So with just five days to go before Election Day, I'm asking you: **[Help write the next chapter of Georgia's future by making your first $3 donation to our campaign for governor.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa788/34a064cc/32dfeef/70c848c/1175210010/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTAxMjAxOC4yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11012018.2-full")** Georgia has a bright future ahead. I believe that deep in my bones - and I know you do, too. We can get there, together. Yours in the fight, Stacey Abrams
---

**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa788/34a064cc/32dfeef/70c848c/1175210010/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTAxMjAxOC4yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-november?refcode=IE11012018.2-full")**

subject: Gina's last debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
|

[ ](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a034/5e076a9e/54dd7b76/14425423/1938138276/VEsH/ "http://ginaraimondo.com")

| | Hey friend, The outcome of tonight's debate couldn't be any clearer. Gina Raimondo is the only candidate with the vision and drive to protect our progress, and Allan Fung and Joe Trillo will threaten the progress Rhode Island has made over the last few years. **[Click here to sign up to Get Out The Vote and protect our progress.](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a034/5e076a9e/54dd7b76/14425422/1938138276/VEsE/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ridems/")** Under Gina Raimondo's leadership, our economy is stronger than it's been in a long time. Her job training and job creation programs have led to the lowest unemployment rate in nearly 30 years. She's made sure that every kid in every city and town has access to full-day kindergarten and created RI Promise to help make sure all Rhode Islanders can get the education and training they need to get ahead. And she's fixing our roads and bridges. In her second term, Gina's going to make sure every kid has access to Pre-K, create universal job training, keep rebuilding our roads and bridges, and keep standing up to the Trump Administration. There's so much more work to do. We can't stop now, and we can't go backwards. That's why we have to re-elect Gina Raimondo on Tuesday, November 6th. **[Will you help by registering for a GOTV shift right now?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a034/5e076a9e/54dd7b76/14425422/1938138276/VEsF/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ridems/")** Thank you, Gabe Gabe Amo
Senior Advisor

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump makes announcement on America’s border crisis
body:
The White House | November 1, 2018

** President Trump makes announcement on America’s border crisis
------------------------------------------------------------

Silence can speak volumes. As a caravan with thousands of migrants heads toward the U.S. border, Democrats and their media allies are hoping Americans won’t notice that the modern left once again has no credible message on illegal immigration.

It didn’t used to be that way. “We simply cannot allow people to pour into the United States undetected, undocumented, unchecked, and circumventing the line of people who are waiting patiently, diligently, and lawfully to become immigrants in this country.” What right-wing extremist uttered those words in 2005? None other than then-Sen. Barack Obama of Illinois.

President Obama wasn’t alone—Sen. Dianne Feinstein (D-CA), former Sen. Harry Reid of Nevada, and other prominent Democrats once echoed those beliefs. Democrats may not have had a real solution to the problem, of course, but they at least understood they must acknowledge that illegal immigration represents a threat to the rule of law.

Not so in 2018. Beholden to an anti-Trump base, Congressional Democrats could only muster an unpopular call to abolish U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7820363f56&e=3ee4985eea) in its entirety as their strongest immigration proposal.

By contrast, President Trump delivered a clear message and proposed solution to the migrant crisis this afternoon. “America is a welcoming country,” he said from the Roosevelt Room of the White House. “We will not allow our generosity to be abused by those who would break our laws, defy our rules, violate our borders, [and] break into our country illegally.”

To confront the problem, “my Administration is finalizing a plan to end the rampant abuse of our asylum system,” the President announced.

Watch: President Trump addresses the immigration crisis from the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=32498a8b70&e=3ee4985eea)

Get the facts: Think there’s no border emergency? Here are the numbers. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a0e461642&e=3ee4985eea)

** News of the week: Paychecks see the biggest jump in a decade
------------------------------------------------------------

Just as President Trump, Larry Kudlow, and Ivanka Trump were preparing to announce that private-sector companies and associations have committed to more than 6 million new training and education opportunities (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d659fd346&e=3ee4985eea) for American workers, more great news on the Trump Economy broke.

“Wages and salaries rose 3.1 percent in the third quarter, the biggest increase in a decade,” CNBC reported yesterday. Pay increases had been the missing link in the economic “recovery” of the Obama years following the 2007-08 Financial Crisis. Now, with unemployment at 3.7 percent—its lowest point since 1969—“wage pressures have begun to build.” That’s a big win for our great workforce.

Bonus: “The wage data came the same day that ADP and Moody’s reported private payroll growth of 227,000 in October, easily beating Wall Street expectations.”

CNBC: “Wages and salaries jump by 3.1%, highest level in a decade” (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74aa3ea9a9&e=3ee4985eea)

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Photo of the day

** Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
------------------------------------------------------------

President Donald J. Trump addresses the illegal immigration crisis and gives an update on border security | November 1, 2018

Privacy Policy (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=16193c8220&e=3ee4985eea) | Contact the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5caa86461a&e=3ee4985eea) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=2a2498e7cd)

The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: FW: time-sensitive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It is a sincere honor to have not one but two esteemed former Secretaries of State supporting my re-election campaign.
Friends, It is a sincere honor to have not one but two esteemed former Secretaries of State supporting my re-election campaign. So I hope you will take a moment to read John Kerry's note below, [**and then chip in**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer="), because he's right -- the election coming up on Tuesday is a matter of unprecedented importance. This race is a must-win for Democrats to take back Congress, **but I am the most vulnerable Democrat in the House** and Republicans are claiming late momentum in our race. We can leave nothing on the table or we could very well come up short. **[Your donation](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** could make or break this race. We have 5 days to go, so please don't hesitate -- [**chip in if you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Yours, Tom \-----forwarded message----- From: John Kerry Subject: time-sensitive **I 'm personally reaching out with a time-sensitive request:** [**Can I count on you to chip in $25 to Tom 's campaign right this moment?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I hate to be so blunt, but Democrats need a win in Arizona or any shot of taking back the House could disappear. And right now, taking back the House is a matter of unprecedented importance. As a former Secretary of State and proud American, I refuse to stand on the sidelines as our shared American ideals are threatened by a chaotic administration with misplaced values. **Let me be clear:** Our nation is at a critical juncture, and while we might sometimes feel powerless to create change -- [_**change is possible and we can make it happen right now by chipping in $25 or more to help elect Tom O 'Halleran.**_](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Tom understands that the integrity of our Democratic values is worth fighting for. And that's why I'm urging you to support him. **You can chip in to Tom 's campaign by clicking this link:** **[http://action.tomohalleran.com/5-days](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** When we see our country drifting down the wrong path, it's the duty of each and every one of us to take action. But time is running out. **Election Day is 5 days away and the fate of our country will be determined by what we do right now to support leaders like Tom.** **I 'm counting on you to rush a donation today -- your support could make the difference on Election Night:** **[http://action.tomohalleran.com/5-days](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thank you, John Kerry | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.01_b2_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

name: Josh Hawley
subject: When the President gives you that kind of advice, you take him up on it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE
body:
Before we stepped onto the stage together at tonight's rally, the President and I talked about the state of our race.

President Trump knows how important this race is. He knows that if we win, we will keep the Senate in Republican hands and keep up the momentum of the last two years. And he knows we need to get Republican voters to the polls to make that happen. [ HELP OUR VOTER OUTREACH EFFORT ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=25f7b0d250a7411990251a19ec24854c&_e=4mWSg4FRryhqtRdYe5rVqM-7v2uxzB5EPuBU2N_MCBNjENeVJhk6PjYxWBBtOjpTYZq9McBj0hgjz3qN0j8udvO0E5h2i2kxZSR136mwBQJ2m4Ic_z0aANlI4nePhpxruKkCVyDdOn4WitJze9KA7bd2Ock4gerKCGm7sj03_G1zXu8CVbKpCsuculWfAaoX6D_VHK1WW3DKlZMFg9SYrD3z3NF6Auofne06EWSwEMieD__mfCUw4llYMZxXzciMTaNztphrFEnvEE3QrsCtfPFEtZapIA9nRzhD5xiHe7c%3D) Senator McCaskill's team has built a massive turnout operation, and we need your help to fund our own.

That's why he asked me to email you one last time before midnight, and when the President gives you that kind of advice, you take him up on it. [ DONATE TODAY ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=25f7b0d250a7411990251a19ec24854c&_e=4mWSg4FRryhqtRdYe5rVqM-7v2uxzB5EPuBU2N_MCBNjENeVJhk6PjYxWBBtOjpTYZq9McBj0hgjz3qN0j8udvNFFumEb9DQApsj7TkRbGm3ZHQbJVKyryekiDuhnc6KsEt9Bl5guCNpvVoo47C3d77ZcexJeXF5HNaNbD1XWN52T3E5a71PzOyTAPK5Rp_ODrPUEOckwRjITtF0gjVOkEPzJCH5_B-D2s_l8F8IzwWv3915yyAKF5wPsMbAEMBTGxcd6uFOYLYaVNp3-767l4-VktdezZgibHqRM-NyZUo%3D) We only have a few days left before voters head to the polls, and if we are successful, we'll have everything we need to support our President for the next 2 years, and beyond.

[Please, make your donation now before it is too late.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=25f7b0d250a7411990251a19ec24854c&_e=4mWSg4FRryhqtRdYe5rVqM-7v2uxzB5EPuBU2N_MCBNjENeVJhk6PjYxWBBtOjpTYZq9McBj0hgjz3qN0j8udsumN_Xh6CGQGeZ4fPzOCkTwvUusbsmU5DAnX9sfREoYQAaIzRIl-oOwdktpVIYm4gLirUtjXlWuydtzbCg8vLj1_OEU2eMc_IEpWsJwa8ZBg61mqBa128BVQaJZ5UoSFdACwpmSbCDsThywISAAmzlc245-jkO8lWvsiHYmPR1ByJJf3oXxDZQm3TxtSTb9OpqyC0AbbnfHdUsWVok3hnc%3D) [ DONATE TODAY ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=25f7b0d250a7411990251a19ec24854c&_e=4mWSg4FRryhqtRdYe5rVqM-7v2uxzB5EPuBU2N_MCBNjENeVJhk6PjYxWBBtOjpTYZq9McBj0hgjz3qN0j8udhOrYD1Da0Yvmt_bzLDcaYcBL5lE8wFp7SBKNXLrcbBbo0uublOp2cvZH_Iebh5P0S8SBc9RxyctpOyab2_aw-q9_KHszQo3P9E_bN6mBms-i6VFogxKtKY9_wZhyUjPYfO69XEiZSktAfL4Dy6RLmZsTLTSPLprvvRBaqMxBVgDAR5iopnd1iHs1ux-XjY1gUYiEA4KnjE7poo0x9YvSCA%3D) For Missouri

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: Millions of conversations
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

For more than a year, our field team and volunteers have contacted and
identified millions of Beto supporters across Texas. Now, something
amazing is happening. We’re watching as these people actually get out and
cast their ballots for Beto!

Every morning, the Texas Secretary of State lists out all the registered
voters who voted early. From this data, we can see which of our supporters
voted. And the numbers are really encouraging.

I really need you to see just how close this race is right now. Out of the
early votes cast in the last 11 days, hundreds of thousands of our ID’d
Beto supporters have already cast their ballots. We know exactly who has
voted and more importantly who said they were supporting Beto in this
election.

There are lots of new voters that no one expected to show up! Beto showed
up and so have they, in record numbers. That doesn’t count the many more
who voted for Beto but weren’t in our database.

It’s SO close. We’re
setting one final fundraising goal of $3.5 million by the time the polls
close on Election Day to fund last-minute advertising to drive up our vote
count. This is urgent:

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181101&t=1019&akid=23421%2E444211%2E_42YrP ]Please rush a contribution of
$3
to Beto right now to help us reach our FINAL campaign fundraising goal.
It’s extremely likely that this race comes down to just a few thousand
votes. Your contribution will make a difference.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181101&t=1020&akid=23421%2E444211%2E_42YrP ]Contribute

clean_body: [1]Beto for Texas For more than a year, our field team and volunteers have contacted and identified millions of Beto supporters across Texas. Now, something amazing is happening. We’re watching as these people actually get out and cast their ballots for Beto! Every morning, the Texas Secretary of State lists out all the registered voters who voted early. From this data, we can see which of our supporters voted. And the numbers are really encouraging. I really need you to see just how close this race is right now. Out of the early votes cast in the last 11 days, hundreds of thousands of our ID’d Beto supporters have already cast their ballots. We know exactly who has voted and more importantly who said they were supporting Beto in this election. There are lots of new voters that no one expected to show up! Beto showed up and so have they, in record numbers. That doesn’t count the many more who voted for Beto but weren’t in our database. It’s SO close. We’re setting one final fundraising goal of $3.5 million by the time the polls close on Election Day to fund last-minute advertising to drive up our vote count. This is urgent: [ ]Please rush a contribution of $3 to Beto right now to help us reach our FINAL campaign fundraising goal. It’s extremely likely that this race comes down to just a few thousand votes. Your contribution will make a difference. name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: SOLD OUT: No more tickets available for Obama rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
Hoosiers –

Thank you so much for your interest in Sunday’s GOTV rally in Gary with President Barack Obama!

Due to overwhelming demand, Sunday’s event has SOLD OUT in less than a day, and every ticket available for distribution has been claimed. There are **no more tickets available**.

As we stated in our initial email, signing up online to request a ticket did not guarantee you entry, and tickets were available only on a first come, first served basis for in person pickup. Your **email confirmation** is not a ticket. You will not be able to enter the rally without a hard paper ticket you have picked up in person.

If you have not picked up a paper ticket, please DO NOT try to pick up a ticket today. All tickets have been claimed, and **ticket offices will NOT be open today**.

If you do not have a ticket, please DO NOT plan to come to the Genesis Center on Sunday, as you will not be able to attend the event.

**If you have picked up a paper ticket** , we’re excited to see you at the Gary Genesis Center (1 Genesis Center Plaza, Gary, IN 46402) on Sunday, November 4. Please arrive early to guarantee access and ensure you can enter in time to see President Obama and the rest of the program. **Doors will open promptly at 12:00 p.m. CT**. Limited parking will be available at Gary Genesis Center. Carpooling and public transportation is encouraged.

See you Sunday,
Your Democratic Team

P.S. Even if you weren’t able to secure a paper ticket, you can still vote early until noon on Monday, November 5th! To find your nearest Early Vote Center, visit **[IndianaVotesEarly.com.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2970151/19353834/1067452478?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGYzMDg4OS05M2RlLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Je27_EnobRikLNL3gVJnRAAOKZN3JirfCd0PzzUqTjQ=)**

1. Democrats have no chance of taking back the Senate majority if Bob Casey loses in Pennsylvania.

2. Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, raised **$221,066** more than Bob in the first half of October, so now Pennsylvania Democrats are playing catch-up to protect this seat.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Need a sample ballot or voter guide? We have you covered!
body:
|
---
| Peter, The partisan noise level is reaching a fever pitch as we approach Election Day 2018. Candidates from every party and zip code are hitting the campaign trail for closing arguments as the news media runs on overdrive analyzing the latest polls and estimating voter turnout. If you’re like me, suffering information overload sifting through automated calls, texts, emails, and political mailers, fear not! **[Download this customized sample ballot for your district, highlighting the differences between candidates—in their own words—on issues, which will directly impact our lives and religious liberty. Endorsements are also listed.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ibayQ8uFkD5SUWdxjC9OY7mglYsxbCkFqLgMoOCnxBaePJatGeij0gXop1_Be1f8780Ydl_XUKyHCYBulS4SIjU&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181102com01&n=1)** Voting shouldn’t be political—but personal. Individually, we may never stand in the halls of Congress, but collectively, we do—symbolized by our vote as we elect leaders who will represent us. If you are unable to drive to the polls, activate one of these nonpartisan Election Day discounts from Uber or Lyft.
* Uber: Click “Get To The Polls" button in-app to activate **$10 off one-way trips to polling stations.** *
* Lyft: Enter your [zip code here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=31LENR9BgsePFvyAr7aruGA_qUVYGRiZy5Gzr4vGER9OvM5XfgVSybUJKNl3tFTm3OPTyWF9FhloICBl_umEQw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181102com01&n=2) to access a discount code specific to your zip code for **50% off rides to the polls.** **
* If you face significant barriers to transportation, **free rides** from both companies available upon request.***

And if you are able to drive to the polls, consider offering a ride to someone who cannot! Voting is faith in action. When we vote, we fight for the lives of the unborn, the freedoms of our children and the future of America. May our faith intercede and prevail in the voting booth. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ibayQ8uFkD5SUWdxjC9OY7mglYsxbCkFqLgMoOCnxBaePJatGeij0gXop1_Be1f8780Ydl_XUKyHCYBulS4SIjU&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181102com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181102com01&n=4) **P.S. If you want your Judeo-Christian values—and not secularism—to be represented and fought for in Congress, join me in praying and voting Tuesday, November 6, 2018! Text PRAY to 40649.** Notes _* Not applicable for return fare or add-on destinations._
_** Limited quantity available—made possible through partnerships with Vote.org, TurboVote, and BuzzFeed._
_*** Non-profit, non-partisan organization partnerships will gift 15,000 people free rides to ensure transportation is not a voting barrier._
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181102com01&n=5).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=xVQJp8sIg0YIME9Lo-Z4syIdVRw_HYS0jEt2wMUQx2eEuRFK5ZOguLktpeYbxh9N&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181102com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FPXYBx5Xyt4ogPU1qeCocIOlLGlV2jWcvDCbIYySOYm8m4a6nxzoW0Ja2quI4O6s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181102com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GevmR3RZALWcgxRmRAu8Xs945EaPwemE7bkwg1RsifpjRSkA2HhVJBLM7TbCqLQ4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181102com01&n=8)

name: Laura Zapata, Bredesen 2018
subject: Phil’s last message to voters (watch)
body:
|
#
Peter -- We’ve just started airing Phil Bredesen’s final message to voters on TV. While I want to make sure you have a chance to see it, I first wanted to ask your help in keeping this positive message on the air. Your donations right now aren’t just going to our historic GOTV operation driving Tennesseans to the polls -- they’re also helping us keep ads like this one on the air so we can put our closing argument of this race in front of undecided voters. This message stands out above all of the nasty attack ads that are on the air right now. **That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $10 or whatever you right now. Can we count on your help at this critical moment?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2977202/19408813/-1197207605?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWM4Njc0MC1iZGRlLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sb3g8suoInTye-XvzBUeEQ86S5m56wF9FZWr4zKUKYs=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181102-closer&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)******
---
******** ****
| ******[Another Amount »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2977203/19408814/-1197207605?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWM4Njc0MC1iZGRlLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sb3g8suoInTye-XvzBUeEQ86S5m56wF9FZWr4zKUKYs=&refcode=em181102-closer&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)******
---
************
In this final TV ad, Governor Bredesen makes it clear to Tennesseans what choice they have in this election. If they like Washington the way it is -- broken and full of division -- then Phil Bredesen’s not your guy.
If they want to send someone to the Senate who will throw out the Washington playbook and bring people together to get things done, then he’s ready for the job.
**Watch the ad, then chip in whatever you can to help us keep it on the air:**

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: coming up short [URGENT]
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | | "Republicans cling to an edge of 2 percentage points over Democrats in pre-Election Day ballots" -_Politico_ , 10/30/18
---
There's no easy way to say this, so I'll be blunt -- **this election is going to be close.** Even though we have been gaining since the start of early voting, Republicans are outpacing Democrats so far.
We need to go all-out from now until the polls close. [**_We need to raise an additional $15,000 before Election Day to give our field teams a boost._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9e/622b7b5b/1da568ab/307b6454/3586131758/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181102?refcode=dwse181102_a&recurring=true&amount=5")
[**I wouldn 't ask if this weren't serious -- make a contribution now, before it's too late.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9e/622b7b5b/1da568ab/307b6454/3586131758/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181102?refcode=dwse181102_a&recurring=true&amount=5")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9e/622b7b5b/1da568ab/307b6457/3586131758/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTAyIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181102?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse181102_a_5&refcode2=861769")**
**[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9e/622b7b5b/1da568ab/307b6457/3586131758/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTAyIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6ImEifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181102?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse181102_a_10&refcode2=861769")**
**[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9e/622b7b5b/1da568ab/307b6457/3586131758/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTAyIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6ImEifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181102?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse181102_a_25&refcode2=861769")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9e/622b7b5b/1da568ab/307b6456/3586131758/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgxMTAyIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6ImEifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse181102?refcode=dwse181102_a_other&refcode2=861769")**
With competitive elections up and down the ballot, Florida is way too close to call. Even a small bump one way or the other could mean the difference when all the votes are counted.
There is good news, though -- Democrats are working together all across the Sunshine State, pooling our resources and helping to reach our supporters. And we're going to need every last bit of energy and passion that we can get.
[**We have an aggressive plan to turn out our voters, but we need your help to put it into action. Contribute now -- $20, $10, even $5 helps.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c9e/622b7b5b/1da568ab/307b6454/3586131758/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181102?refcode=dwse181102_a&recurring=true&amount=5")
Thank you,
Debbie

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: In the closing days of this campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

I’ve spent the last 13 days of early voting in every part of the state.
We’ve held more than 60 events, from rallies in Austin, Round Rock and San
Antonio, to big gatherings in Amarillo, Lubbock and Wichita Falls. We’ve
been with you in East Texas, Lufkin, Longview, Tyler. And North Texas too:
Midlothian, Dallas, Fort Worth, Irving and Denton.

Yesterday, I was in Corpus Christi, Robstown, Raymondville and
Brownsville. So much energy, so many people who’ve voted and are now
committed to getting everyone in their lives to vote as well.

Everywhere we go, people come up to me and say “This is the first time
I’ve ever voted, and I’m voting for you!” Or “I took my mom to vote in her
first midterm election!” More than a few have told me that they’ve never
voted for a Democrat before, but this year they are. Not because of my
party, but because of the chance we all have to do something big for this
country at this critical moment.

It seems to reflect the early voting totals that show Texans are voting at
nearly the same levels as the last presidential election.

In the closing days of this campaign (there are just four days left!!) I
am going to make sure that I reach every last newly registered voter;
every voter who typically sits out a midterm; every voter who knows that
at this point our political party can no longer define us. I’m going to
give them the opportunity to vote with us in the election of our
lifetime.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181102&t=1019&akid=23567%2E444211%2EEsCLOU ]I’m going to need your help. Please contribute to ensure that we have
the resources to bring in more block-walkers, keep our ads running on more
TV stations, connect with more voters in every one of the 254 counties.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181102&t=1020&akid=23567%2E444211%2EEsCLOU ]Contribute
$3
»

We can win this if we all do everything we can, with what we have at this

Counting on you!

Thank you,

Beto

We’ve held more than 60 events, from rallies in Austin, Round Rock and San Antonio, to big gatherings in Amarillo, Lubbock and Wichita Falls. We’ve been with you in East Texas, Lufkin, Longview, Tyler. And North Texas too: Midlothian, Dallas, Fort Worth, Irving and Denton. Yesterday, I was in Corpus Christi, Robstown, Raymondville and Brownsville. So much energy, so many people who’ve voted and are now committed to getting everyone in their lives to vote as well. name: Ben Jealous
subject: The numbers are in
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporate donors, because we're a grassroots-powered campaign
body:
This is a good sign.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3791cd/7ab0e2c4/7e7f513e/3499b4bf/2753603497/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-push?refcode=OHQ11028A") You're an important member of my team, friend -- so I wanted you to be the first to know: We had an ambitious goal of raising $75,000 in grassroots donations before the end of October. Honestly, I wasn't sure we could do it -- after all, we're up against a corporate-backed campaign with millions of dollars left in their war chest. It's always been an uphill battle for us, and I was worried this might be the moment we fell short. **But good news: We didn't fall short. We shattered that goal, and we shattered expectations. Just like we will again in just four days on Election Day.** **You can still donate to support this final push to Election Day -- we have ads to run, doors to knock, and materials to hand out. None of that is paid for by corporate donors, because we're a grassroots-powered campaign.** [**Which means we need your support: Donate $5 or more to fund the fight to Election Day now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3791cd/7ab0e2c4/7e7f513e/3499b4bf/2753603497/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-push?refcode=OHQ11028A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c3791cd/7ab0e2c4/7e7f513e/3499b4be/2753603497/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-final-push?refcode=OHQ11028A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

name: Dana Bye
subject: Steve Bannon is coming to campaign for Rep. Brat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Steve Bannon, the former White House strategist and head of the far-right website Breitbart, is coming to Central Virginia this weekend to "whip up" support for Rep. Brat, The Washington Post reports.
| | Peter, Republican Super PACs have spent millions of dollars attacking Abigail on television, and Rep. Dave Brat called in Vice President Mike Pence to boost his campaign. _But that wasn 't enough to stop our grassroots campaign_ \-- and so more big guns are swooping in to try. **Steve Bannon, the former White House strategist and head of the far-right website _Breitbart,_ is coming to Central Virginia this weekend to "whip up" support for Rep. Brat,** _The Washington Post_ reports. [**Please make a donation today, Peter, to send Bannon a message: Central Virginia families -- not Rep. Brat 's reinforcements from D.C. -- will decide this race.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oq-wyBq1LIDzMQ2-lj052RMCBZxEugiJEEXU3ojhK9c=/gaEbuyuixzPpQObfdpN3qY3wj6gMp3P6Cz_y6T-zCmM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.02_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Bannon is coming to our district to boost Rep. Brat for a simple reason: Rep. Brat has consistently prioritized his own extreme ideology over his constituents, and Bannon wants to keep as many party-line politicians in office as possible. _But Abigail is on the verge of unseating Rep. Brat, so Bannon feels threatened._ And he's right to worry, Peter, because with your support we can win this race. [**Chip in to our campaign today so we can fight back against Bannon and surge to a lead.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oq-wyBq1LIDzMQ2-lj052RMCBZxEugiJEEXU3ojhK9c=/gaEbuyuixzPpQObfdpN3qY3wj6gMp3P6Cz_y6T-zCmM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.02_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/oq-wyBq1LIDzMQ2-lj052RMCBZxEugiJEEXU3ojhK9c=/gaEbuyuixzPpQObfdpN3qY3wj6gMp3P6Cz_y6T-zCmM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.02_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/oq-wyBq1LIDzMQ2-lj052RMCBZxEugiJEEXU3ojhK9c=/gaEbuyuixzPpQObfdpN3qY3wj6gMp3P6Cz_y6T-zCmM=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/oq-wyBq1LIDzMQ2-lj052RMCBZxEugiJEEXU3ojhK9c=/EYTgJQ4t9UPlVnEofOZS51Twp_HD7wonlRbxLi_V06c=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

body:
** Anyone can make a difference with just $5. Tap or Click for your chance >>> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/anderson-rally-with-mike-braun-congresswoman-brooks-467721?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1828539c8c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Friend,

Did you realize that you could send a message to Washington, D.C. for only $5? Well, you can, while at the same time making sure we get enough voters to the polls on Election Day. We all know Democrat Joe Donnelly plays the DC Shuffle game -- pretending to be a Hoosier at home while voting like a Liberal in DC. But **Hoosiers are on to Joe's game and it's time to send him a message that regular people like you and me are tired of it.**

[**Your donation of $5, $25 or $50 tells Democrat Joe Donnelly that regular Hoosiers are tired of his games.**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2261eec00a&e=1acd9bb3d6)

It tells him that Mike Braun speaks for all of us and it allows us to make sure that all of our Get Out The Vote efforts are funded.

Having the right candidate is important but it won't matter if we don't have enough votes on Election Day. You and I both know we have to do EVERYTHING we can to make sure we have a Republican Senate in January.

[**Please donate $5, $25, or $50 to send that message. We can't do it without your support.**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bee597d501&e=1acd9bb3d6)

All the best,

Pete Seat
Executive Director of Strategic Communications

name: Senator Klobuchar
subject: Critical races in Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
Everything is on the line in this election -- and here in Minnesota we have the chance to flip the U.S. House of Representatives in just four days.
**Will you step up again to send Minnesota leaders to Congress so we can change the direction in Washington? Rush in a contribution today so Dan Feehan, Angie Craig, Dean Phillips and Joe Radinovich can bring a new direction to the U.S. House.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Dan Feehan, Angie Craig, Dean Phillips and Joe Radinovich will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=H%2BsA2VcWuLMxgrzvc4OZwKJWh%2FuTc42%2B)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=PAwTh1dNOiZw%2FFr0XAwJFKJWh%2FuTc42%2B)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=QG3QEQE8ugQbo7S14Pw%2BJ6JWh%2FuTc42%2B)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=LIDz58wosr8q1IVC8E9R66JWh%2FuTc42%2B)**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=zpTzU2LoAErUMbrO2khMvaJWh%2FuTc42%2B)****
President Trump has campaigned in Duluth and Rochester this year -- proof that he's targeting Minnesota and all of these races are close.
By sending Dan, Angie, Dean and Joe to Congress we'll be standing up for our Minnesota values and for a country that believes in hard work, getting things done, and treating each other with civility and dignity.
**[There's not much time left, and these four races are critical to the direction of our country. Can I count on you to help Dan, Angie, Dean and Joe win in just four days?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=gn0Z0a%2F9XuNUFPDZbjrjOKJWh%2FuTc42%2B)**
Thanks for all you do,
Amy

clean_body: Hi, Everything is on the line in this election -- and here in Minnesota we have the chance to flip the U.S. House of Representatives in just four days. Will you step up again to send Minnesota leaders to Congress so we can change the direction in Washington? Rush in a contribution today so Dan Feehan, Angie Craig, Dean Phillips and Joe Radinovich can bring a new direction to the U.S. House. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Dan Feehan, Angie Craig, Dean Phillips and Joe Radinovich will go through immediately: ** President Trump has campaigned in Duluth and Rochester this year -- proof that he's targeting Minnesota and all of these races are close. By sending Dan, Angie, Dean and Joe to Congress we'll be standing up for our Minnesota values and for a country that believes in hard work, getting things done, and treating each other with civility and dignity. Thanks for all you do, Amy

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen Campaign Manager
subject: Trump is on his way
body:
|
#
Peter -- We learned this week that Donald Trump is on his way to campaign and raise money again for Congresswoman Blackburn on Sunday, and here’s why: **Tennessee is a toss-up.** But Governor Bredesen has made it clear from the beginning that he is not running against President Trump. He is running to represent us here in Tennessee. And that’s why we’re giving voters a clear choice in this race: if they want more of the same shouting and bickering from Washington, then Phil Bredesen isn’t for them. But if voters want to hire someone who has a track record of getting things done for Tennessee, then Phil Bredesen is ready for the job. It’s time for our country to do big things again and get us back to the days where we could work together to get things done. That is why I’m asking: **Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can ahead of our final fundraising deadline in this race? name: Team Tabitha
subject: Time is running out for us - Donate now!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/TI-Email-Theme-Header.png]

I have to say - we're crushing it.

But we could do more. Donate now: https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lw7E5S3uc0eS5ySIJdKd2Q2

I couldn't be prouder of what we have accomplished.
- We have TV ads running nearly every hour of the day on every local station and a bunch of cable stations - plus ads on Facebook too!
- We have 9 digital billboards across the district reminding people to vote for Solutions Not Sides.
- We have two volunteer locations humming along in Montgomery and another in Dothan. Plus additional offices in Andalusia and Ozark run by partners.
- We are hiring cars and vans to take folks to the polls - in Bullock County, Houston County, and Butler County.We will be texting last minute reminders to 30,000 voters.
- We are sending postcards to thousands of voters for whom we don't have a good phone number.

Feeling excited? Send us $$$ to keep it going! https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lw7E5S3uc0eS5ySIJdKd2Q2

But there are still things we'd like to be doing but can't because we just don't have the money.
- We could be doing more TV ads in these final days.
- We could be hiring cars and vans to talk folks to the polls in an additional 12 counties.
- We could have a predictive dialer to make reminder phone calls more quickly.

If you want to see us beat the odds and deliver a startling upset, now is the time to give ALL you can. Your contributions will go DIRECTLY to our get out the vote efforts!

Donate Now: https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lw7E5S3uc0eS5ySIJdKd2Q2

Connect With Us:
Call the office at 334-425-8626
Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/TabithaIsner]
Twitter [http://www.twitter.com/TabithaK]

Checks made out to "Friends of Tabitha Isner" can be sent to:
PO Box 6340
Montgomery, AL 36106

Campaign HQ Address:
1460 Ann St.
Montgomery, AL 36107

name: Tori Taylor
subject: Coming up on the end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Mailers are printed. Ads were sent into the TV stations. Canvassers have their walk packets. Yard signs have been delivered. With four days to go, all that's left is to Get Out the Vote!
|
---

| | Mailers are printed. Ads were sent into the TV stations. Canvassers have their walk packets. Yard signs have been delivered. With four days to go, all that's left is to Get Out the Vote! [**We need you to give toward our GOTV Fund. Even a small contribution will go a long, long way.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542792a/e3b7d3/5e2043e0/25556cc0/217343063/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181102am?refcode=kme181102am_m") Yes, it's Friday. Yes, it's almost the weekend. But this is one of the closest races in the country. The election is Tuesday. Voters are already casting ballots. **This isn't a normal weekend for us -- it's the LAST ONE of the race.** Rep. Ted Budd and his special interest allies are playing dirty. Their attacks are so incredibly false that several of their ads were taken down by the networks and community leaders, news organizations, and constituents continue to call him out on it. [**Hitting this goal is absolutely essential. name: Bredesen for Senate
subject: Where you come in
body:
|
#
Peter -- Phil Bredesen’s message is focused on bringing real people together to get things done for Tennessee families, not scoring partisan points or cozying up to special interests. But that means we can’t rely on the same blank checks and unlimited resources from special interest groups that our opponent is counting on. The only way we’ll win is if enough people join us and take ownership of this race to help get our message in front of voters. **And that’s where you come in.** Right now with just days until Election Day, Tennesseans from every walk of life are putting the time they can into making calls, door knocking, and doing what they can to make sure voters are ready to head to the polls on Tuesday. But we need more help -- so we’re asking: **[Can you sign up for a volunteer shift near you in the final days of this election? Your support will be critical to our get-out-the-vote operation, and any time you can commit will be a big help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2982419/19450240/-926015414?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzc2MTUwNy1kY2RlLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p1jKOasGaGiuk4-yIjz4gEzBvKIInBZWU__IEcvQLmY=)** | | ******[Sign up to volunteer »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2982420/19450241/-926015414?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzc2MTUwNy1kY2RlLWU4MTEtODYwNy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p1jKOasGaGiuk4-yIjz4gEzBvKIInBZWU__IEcvQLmY=)******

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Jobs Smash Estimates With Gain of 250,000, Wage Gains Pass 3% for First Time Since Recession
body:
West Wing Reads Logo

**

** Jobs Smash Estimates With Gain of 250,000, Wage Gains Pass 3% for First Time Since Recession
------------------------------------------------------------
------------------------------------------------------------

The new jobs numbers released this morning are a homerun for American workers: “Job growth blew past expectations in October and year-over-year wage gains jumped past 3 percent for the first time since the Great Recession,” Jeff Cox reports for CNBC.

“Nonfarm payrolls powered up by 250,000 for the month, well ahead of Refinitiv estimates of 190,000. The unemployment rate stayed at 3.7 percent, the lowest since December 1969... But the bigger story may be wage growth, which has been the missing piece of the economic recovery.”

Click here to read more. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e98dd83f4b&e=3ee4985eea)

Speaking from the White House yesterday, President Donald J. Trump highlighted the urgent need to confront America’s border crisis, Fred Lucas writes in The Daily Signal (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=18efd1e70e&e=3ee4985eea) . The President announced that “he is working on an executive order to deny automatic entry to the U.S. to illegal immigrants claiming asylum unless they go to a legal port of entry.” The Administration’s goal is to “end the rampant abuse of our asylum system.”

Learn more: America’s weak asylum laws are fueling a crisis at the border. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=acde494017&e=3ee4985eea)

In CNS News (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=56513e8a71&e=3ee4985eea) , Terence P. Jeffrey reports that “manufacturing jobs in the United States increased by 32,000 in October and have now increased by 434,000 during the presidency of Donald Trump, according to data released today by the Bureau of Labor Statistics.” American manufacturing employment peaked in 1979 and has been making a comeback under President Trump.

The Investor’s Business Daily (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=811f54810b&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board poses this question: Are Americans better off than we were two years ago? “In the first three quarters of 2016, quarterly GDP growth was an anemic 1.5%, 2.3% and 1.9%. This year, quarterly GDP growth has been a far more robust 2.2%, 4.2% and 3.5%.” This turnaround under President Trump was not only unexpected “but deemed impossible by Democrats, who were trying to convince the public that 2% growth was the best this country could do.”

Privacy Policy (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d4e8155985&e=3ee4985eea) | Contact the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6499f925e0&e=3ee4985eea) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=525691b216)

The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Our future is truly on the ballot in this election. Please double-check your polling place and make a plan to vote >>
Folks,

Last night I stepped on stage to debate my opponent in this campaign, and the choice for voters in Ohio's 13th District couldn't be clearer:

My opponent would be just another vote in favor of repealing the Affordable Care Act and protections for people with pre-existing conditions. Another vote in support of tax cuts for big corporations and the ultra-rich while Republicans in Washington threaten to slash Social Security and Medicare to pay for it. Another vote to underfund critical investments in education, workforce training, and environmental protection.

**[Our future is truly on the ballot in this election. Please double-check your polling place and make a plan to vote>>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ab/5486deaa/24e2c5a4/dcf0699/1209517200/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH")**

[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ab/5486deaa/24e2c5a4/dcf0699/1209517200/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH")

**Washington doesn't need another Republican who will vote in lockstep with Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell -- it needs independent thinkers who will go to bat for their constituents regardless of party. **

I'm the only candidate in this race who has made protecting -- and expanding -- Social Security, Medicare, and access to health care a lifelong goal in public service, and who has consistently fought to make sure our students and our workers have the best training available.

With only days to go, it's more important than ever for Democrats to take control of Congress -- to protect seniors and workers and undo this incredible mess to our social safety net and critical funding that supports a thriving civil society.

**[I'm asking for your vote on or before November 6 -- because while we've done so much work together, there's still so much more to do. Click here to double-check your polling place>>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ab/5486deaa/24e2c5a4/dcf0699/1209517200/VEsF/ "https://iwillvote.com/locate/?lang=en&state=OH")**

Thank you for being on Team Ryan,

\-- Tim
P.S. Already voted, or want to help another way? **[Donate $5 or any amount to help get out the vote across Ohio's 13th District.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a90ab/5486deaa/24e2c5a4/dcf0698/1209517200/VEsC/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_nov18?refcode=em20181102_postdebate_oh13")**
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
---

Niles, Ohio 44446

name: Leah
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
I know the liberal media wants to count us out. They want to say it’s all over and their polls prove it. But let’s not forget – they said the same....

**ELECTION COUNTDOWN**

Days Until the Election: 4 Days
| [EMERGENCY DONATION](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8aa1dace2eb14007b6ea923b29d6bd5c&_e=l7vKJTh6qsnz_t1rdSFddctwG5xKxtW2RadiS6DIBHfKrjr62efm296ZOyX6Nju4ydWBrXdB9Booecr27GIhI_Gc0D8fOIQqHoTS56-1m4U19D91RYyJgohAkiYDzowiKAzhGrGAQDzKDt6SZb9nutaouEPuRvc8ifx0rs4Td0Pmvxs4r8czkS9sY_5vvimX-pdoHVwzEJkveFYrhG65LdbSTY5vaSXzDA3oEwBGxWEm30y3TNHWCbyAk1aFNE2qArxIonoSCAxdG7km5vBQte8BVDzGU0oIH_dc2nvAMZIDFwTNyHawo-dDBD_DdO_tsfFyB0kCcwW6yBazLSnCS6Apu7CjTcpKDYOAeuTbvJViWjs60OhPpkiYUJF1DJAorf5ioZ6p9PTsIRfYZUqXxqKOmn6wlSK30nlKFbUj2YA%3D)
---

If you’re looking at polls, friend, they don’t look great. According to the mainstream media, Tammy Baldwin is ahead of us by double digits.

I know the liberal media wants to count us out. They want to say it’s all over and their polls prove it. But let’s not forget – they said the same thing about President Trump and Senator Johnson. They were wrong then. They’re wrong now.

**We’ve got what counts: grassroots supporters like you who are willing to work hard to win this election! And we’re going to win in November just like we won the primary – TOGETHER! **
[SUPPORT LEAH: $25](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8aa1dace2eb14007b6ea923b29d6bd5c&_e=l7vKJTh6qsnz_t1rdSFddctwG5xKxtW2RadiS6DIBHduRpIPvUnwMPnA0gniWZcmsXclk2_9ovpEL97Z-BYs0vvywx5I9dcLWPHZMC0pvAPYSa5dTSLS2VFsTfvqbvVy5VYyJonlvBSyPya5tl6DDKN2a1owLLgdDj1WGljoXv_5yiIFDGS5RRkNq7-2c6pZ_McgcgMTEdlFraSwV_ecP6qnSkvBJMRIQV1GAFnb0xkEOIHhlgsEshdEDCagfFTx0cZsTslgHGbb4FUua5N2rT5wyowT7axUjpaVCOdKfwUqgBJg_UU9IZEvJIONGPerV1PzmMyKTWA3gcYUkHFjMTwlvvxqMABz3X6TRUifC4furAXxtXDUnqlRa1o4nFy0NE-_pydtXABYwQcfP6YMMx5VJ969Fsw2cRT8uEtCM5gi_YGLvBURsqZyqbe01LkW)

There’s no substitute for grassroots support! And friend, I’d choose you over the fake news any day.

I know that if we come together again, we can defeat Tammy Baldwin and finally elect a new Senator that will represent our values and put an end to the dysfunction in Washington.

The stakes couldn't be any higher, friend.

We just need to keep our momentum up and support our volunteers and staffers in all of our efforts to get out the vote! [**Can you make an emergency donation today to help out?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8aa1dace2eb14007b6ea923b29d6bd5c&_e=l7vKJTh6qsnz_t1rdSFddctwG5xKxtW2RadiS6DIBHfKrjr62efm296ZOyX6Nju4ydWBrXdB9Booecr27GIhI_Gc0D8fOIQqHoTS56-1m4U19D91RYyJgohAkiYDzowiKAzhGrGAQDzKDt6SZb9nutaouEPuRvc8ifx0rs4Td0Pmvxs4r8czkS9sY_5vvimXED3Nsr1xYzfVzgJnTyVW06v6vddrYaVFEkj2O4hufVdeQh_zGSbQg2y1AI6ToC4BLhQRFdKvIqR6k2uUNt0SV6k10pkimugw3saPujMivbPY3bRah1PyEBtzx7_6XsGW-UlVjgTIQzCVgntJHZR-QqZtwhICbvIcfe-Q7sxSlMOiC0OX-W4iGVOFMv4Yt8BXpEyOXzzJlWFX-KVMEf1GJKcphaPzN4A2NyDNnKyrpcY%3D)

Together, we can bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington.

Thanks,

Leah

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8aa1dace2eb14007b6ea923b29d6bd5c&_e=tzNHafBh5JCIDnXseeFoYhJ8E5-afj8xpwCQQZ5AzoWMPgf-C7VF-TXxJkOxxaPISidXKP5u8_HXVBanF0cotdtSghCY7oZkSFXgeHJ70DbIb5MO44KYTrVxIv0Z5zBwUGUTlaTV7Or9aBdPUwuPBarxKXcWGeuupRh-GFvFQmTUPtjfZmpb2Zc46Wd-kysEzUsGmz1Mch56yHlaFRZDiM4endjA3-W8Vau13nbQoJMbvPvT_5H5Fwrn3nZFgGiM). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8aa1dace2eb14007b6ea923b29d6bd5c&_e=l7vKJTh6qsnz_t1rdSFdde15drUXY6daO_uaN8hIM_7XUo8zBwz-Vf1PWHj9tgu-8JRQYDH31cUtL1mBfsjUmf3_PGXthopUj8slXJn2Lh8sjge2WnvbO4Xpwxc4YXFHkwTlCWWsqtxCILnuYA_MhZ-ykh0OVXy5qmITxz573yCtnDYiEsfW6VxYlLRZRiJ5NJGn43nlnr6qoo0ZdwMDG2Woq24XHToHoVanM5jn4cG30-S55FHo2dBb9clQA3YFMHbO3jSftWIZbGW8LgyaYJ-PnX5rWu_no1n6OkfNOX7dWdxNpHLhny7OS3A6SgrINH8O_Oi-CZlChTm8Qtybd-AwW_j872p26MidXGMZRDHjh3n_IjcSGNPresVEF030) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8aa1dace2eb14007b6ea923b29d6bd5c&_e=l7vKJTh6qsnz_t1rdSFdde15drUXY6daO_uaN8hIM_5KNMBNou7wvvG_Ukp3nOKIgZKGqY-wj7TL4LbkjK6xffdisGJOPVqZN11tji1X2eZ73dXn5nmtrI7DEC4yAQE85x0elm8Z8l8BIhR0nirZ0WGgldnhEP3g5jevxnrimjR0fnUWvkITZVHul4pJMQtQqFeghEse7meNQHg58TAkQR_DMpLDyiJr297p0Sxz0kgkmX0fUOtkL-3sYICmZ_l4HihwIRBvTN7FUnlW_5meO-ZwVTptNR-YgWlqNCDC352Mhah8hMzx4Js4UwhH-q1C1trt5uCVNTmbiEjrcDJIdXpYPU-kLaRg6IsDJOzi1iWpFjAO2g37vLR7jLaAsyA3) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8aa1dace2eb14007b6ea923b29d6bd5c&_e=l7vKJTh6qsnz_t1rdSFddehvQBMUgY0UbvvqfO29fgxRxe_HXEQTtgpjkePqwK1KjqT9nA2BA2oM3dwRNPhwuWlwWa-rKP3LWAliGewmrE1EfFrN6yk8NwbDzldrqtHxY1v5wpX0EAgtFoVoXcOCQySDPisgvwm6eoFUiR_P-cvaCR76vHuSU3GB5Hx3_q1SDyQ0CpiSAhxkshBTYBzR4_bSBDaQpPfMYL0bA0KshIlx7aKFe-u4iWzaqsxQ7vnblE-9bZQrH0U_Y3ErjG_j1Q%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8aa1dace2eb14007b6ea923b29d6bd5c&_e=l7vKJTh6qsnz_t1rdSFddTz0oXSns9jBOCLPD2DsbCAq2Q0ORuxw6byItJvQKiUkukgWCPUSNZYT1QQtAkxdmBm6Me8Qm4s1rNEBQDo-E3AQwx3tAdkAKn8iudsXrUdvy6_qQAFaWKon5lJHW9xQZn6hP7-kuILTlB7eMvvprm4rroxGJ82ugErYfcRWFx5HVZTqQXUhk150RouI4DW1DFzhhbtk-Ucse71A24_qJcnQSXaCaTgm9qVz6kh6OwmU-6eJyZVRm7AUkVdIeAYXuA%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8aa1dace2eb14007b6ea923b29d6bd5c&_e=l7vKJTh6qsnz_t1rdSFddak7RrmQSNRGzQfjeO3EavKPMgqSUBeWyjx9IwYfDlyzprSmTVTK12_GxVBnbxc24xoSkdVqH_JlIZATPiSopXXFMfnNXXRwskPKzeJeZKaOIHBPlE518fSoptRuymQleop824q4yU3Wag5-gnIwd9YHQvR8iEPs_B9Ai8sDGbD5Yn0BePLzHq5z1Ymu0HKtyzOWwvy7s0QQOyC7I_xU2GDjMTD30xAlKZQscZ_AA0qMENJ_mK8aTiekN9mpdUGrAA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8aa1dace2eb14007b6ea923b29d6bd5c&_e=l7vKJTh6qsnz_t1rdSFdde15drUXY6daO_uaN8hIM_6sDt3uVPCUj1CUkMGOyvwasH5jBHdLw3n9GkK56eHd5SYyLxjyiuKUPwc-ahMBEEdDItInlNfo_H_AQkRaQf-edWQ1wx4MrSpIP6QhlShbfXil4GGv8lTBoS5ghkVd6Fy6BCkT-9XiAmQApxZdnijEDeE2RKFjfpsZ6V_K_wiX3diliwWQ3XtvyBQNpjweRlVet0gSqOOdVvyODckCEogqWYc0bu1gCdGHSJk57egZjQBt2E2spLYUVKmMFB3m5SRT4hnmsLhvJ32cyLaT5UrwMb5gaL0nOIMEBPS5JXoWdvxVNVOBQQCbgoLhhBrb0zXfC4jYdS5tvHYdQ9Yh3rPLYqwreYEyAxGUTODE4MVW_g%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8aa1dace2eb14007b6ea923b29d6bd5c&_e=tzNHafBh5JCIDnXseeFoYhJ8E5-afj8xpwCQQZ5AzoWMPgf-C7VF-TXxJkOxxaPISidXKP5u8_HXVBanF0cotdtSghCY7oZkSFXgeHJ70DbIb5MO44KYTrVxIv0Z5zBwUGUTlaTV7Or9aBdPUwuPBarxKXcWGeuupRh-GFvFQmTUPtjfZmpb2Zc46Wd-kysEzUsGmz1Mch56yHlaFRZDiM4endjA3-W8Vau13nbQoJMbvPvT_5H5Fwrn3nZFgGiM) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=8aa1dace2eb14007b6ea923b29d6bd5c&_e=tzNHafBh5JCIDnXseeFoYhJ8E5-afj8xpwCQQZ5AzoWMPgf-C7VF-TXxJkOxxaPISidXKP5u8_HXVBanF0cotdtSghCY7oZkSFXgeHJ70DbIb5MO44KYTrVxIv0Z5zBwUGUTlaTV7Or9aBdPUwuPBarxKXcWGeuupRh-GFvFQmTUPtjfZmpb2Zc46Wd-kysEzUsGmz1Mch56yHlaFRZDiM4endjA3-W8Vau13nbQoJMbvPvT_5H5Fwrn3nZFgGiM) to unsubscribe. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Last day to vote early
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Today is the last day of early voting. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa78a/34a064cc/3206fa2/70cfc77/2741430094/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Hi there, Today is the last day of early voting, so if you haven't cast your ballot yet, now is the time! Early voting is critical because we're leaving nothing to chance in this election. We're getting our votes in early so we have time to fix any problems that could arise - and still have time to sign up for a GOTV shift this weekend. We need to ensure that every eligible voter who didn't vote early has a plan to get to the polls on Election Day. That's why I voted early myself just last week! **[Click here for more information on where to find your polling location and what to bring with you in order to ensure your vote is counted.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa78a/34a064cc/3206fa2/70cfc74/2741430094/VEsE/ "https://staceyabrams.com/vote/")** **[And once you've cast your ballot, sign up for a GOTV shift for this weekend, the final weekend before Election Day. This race will be won or lost on Georgians' front steps, so we need as many volunteers as possible knocking on doors.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa78a/34a064cc/3206fa2/70cfc75/2741430094/VEsF/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/events-2/")** Every day we wait to take action is a day of democracy delayed. So please, vote early, volunteer, and tell your friends and family to do the same. This is important. Yours, Stacey Abrams
---

**[VOLUNTEER](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa78a/34a064cc/3206fa2/70cfc75/2741430094/VEsC/ "https://www.georgiademocrat.org/events-2/")**

|

Fighters for our environment and our working class can only win if Democrats turn out and VOTE. We’re trying to make sure that happens, but we’re still $2735 away from our goal.

body:
I know it can feel like we're in a never-ending news cycle of heartache and frustration. And as a country, we know we can do better. But what helps me when I'm down is this: --------------------------
|

[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10bc/3e0906/75dcaffb/3e376a4f/2146758711/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181102_2_FR_JR_jess-LDND&source=20181102_2_FR_JR_jess-LDND")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, for the next four days Virginia Democrats are going to be doing something really special: talking to hundreds of thousands of Virginians, making sure they get to the polls.

These next four days are going to take a lot of people, a lot of clipboards, a lot of ads and mailing pieces, and Derek, a lot of heart.

I know it can feel like we're in a never-ending news cycle of heartache and frustration. And as a country, we know we can do better. And what helps me when I'm feeling really downhearted about things is lacing up my shoes and getting to work so we can vote for better policies and better representatives.

So let's pour our hearts into something meaningful and be a part of electing representatives in Virginia that are kind-hearted and compassionate.

name: Heidi Heitkamp
subject: GOP buying my seat (time is running out!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Team, I need your immediate help. Voters have already begun casting their ballots in North Dakota. And everyone from The Washington Post to Roll Call continues to increase my likelihood of losing. Things aren't looking good.
It gets even worse: Twenty-three right-wing groups, including a Mitch McConnell-linked Super PAC, are spending more than $10 million to buy our Senate seat -- and trust me, that kind of money goes a long way in North Dakota.
That's why we're going to need to hit every single fundraising goal between now and Election Day. With just hours until midnight, we're pretty far behind. Time is running out.
**I wouldn't ask if it weren't important:[Please, can you give $3 or more right now -- whatever you can spare -- to win in North Dakota so we can take back the Senate for Democrats?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc129/2a380d31/3749c4df/f17e12/2016667497/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGhlaWRpIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODExMDJfTVdINEhILUhIXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4heidi?refcode=e20181102_MWH4HH-HH_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**
NBC News, Roll Call and POLITICO all say I'm the most vulnerable Democratic senator in the entire country. That's why CNN downgraded our race from "Toss Up" to "Lean Republican." Quite literally, whether we hit this goal could mean the difference between winning and losing.
That's why I'm counting on your immediate contribution: Will you donate right now to help us reach our critical goal, win in North Dakota and protect every Democratic Senate seat?
[**Give $3 or every dollar you can right now -- before our midnight deadline -- to defend North Dakota's Democratic Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats!**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc129/2a380d31/3749c4df/f17e13/2016667497/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGhlaWRpIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODExMDJfTVdINEhILUhIXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4heidi?refcode=e20181102_MWH4HH-HH_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
So much is at stake, and I'm so grateful to have you on my team. Thank you.
Heidi

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc129/2a380d31/3749c4df/f17e1c/2016667497/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibXdoNGhlaWRpIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODExMDJfTVdINEhILUhIXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mwh4heidi?refcode=e20181102_MWH4HH-HH_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: Team Bredesen
subject: Good news for us
body:
|
#
Peter -- Early voting ended yesterday in Tennessee, and we have some numbers that point to good news for our campaign:
1. **More than 1.3 MILLION voters cast their ballots early in Tennessee.**

2. **We finished early voting with a 219% increase in voter turnout compared to Tennessee’s early voter turnout in 2014.**

3. **In-person early voting in Tennessee had the greatest increase in voter participation from 2014 to 2018 compared to any other state in the country.**

But here’s what we also still know is true — this race is on a knife’s edge, and with dark money groups still pouring millions into Tennessee for false attacks on Phil Bredesen, we can’t take any momentum for granted. Election Day will be our last chance to get voters to the polls, so we have to ask: **Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us keep the turnout high and win on Election Day? clean_body: | Peter -- Early voting ended yesterday in Tennessee, and we have some numbers that point to good news for our campaign: 1. More than 1.3 MILLION voters cast their ballots early in Tennessee. 2. We finished early voting with a 219% increase in voter turnout compared to Tennessee’s early voter turnout in 2014. 3. In-person early voting in Tennessee had the greatest increase in voter participation from 2014 to 2018 compared to any other state in the country. But here’s what we also still know is true — this race is on a knife’s edge, and with dark money groups still pouring millions into Tennessee for false attacks on Phil Bredesen, we can’t take any momentum for granted. Election Day will be our last chance to get voters to the polls, so we have to ask: Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help us keep the turnout high and win on Election Day? We know if we get every voter we can to cast a ballot, we’ll win this thing. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Thanks for standing with us, Team Bredesen Paid for by Bredesen Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Bredesen for Senate and the Tennessee Democratic Party Bredesen Victory Fund P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

body:
Bumping this note from Mike to the top of your inbox,
Peter. Democrats across the state and
country are planning to contact a record number of voters over
the next few days, and they’re counting on our support to help
them in this final sprint.

We need another $3,072 in the door before the banks close so
we can send support where it’s needed first thing tomorrow. Even
just a few dollars goes a long way. Can you help?
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-nov18?refcode=MT_EM_FR_ND_181102_2_3&amount=10.00&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

body:
We need your help this weekend.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120399c/2fde7c66/49dfbc0c/15686bb3/2337299167/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ctdeadline2?refcode=20181012_btm_deadline6&recurring=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

This is it, Friend. This weekend is our final chance to get people out to the polls before Election Day.

You don't want to wake up the day after Election Day and wonder if there was more you could have done to help break the Republican supermajority.

Knocking on doors is the most effective way to help out in these final days -- plus it can be a lot of fun.

**We've got everything set up for you to come and help out -- are you in? Find the event nearest you and sign up to join us for these final days:** | [I'M IN](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120399c/2fde7c66/49dfbc0c/15686bb2/2337299167/VEsE/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ncdems/")
---
For the last year and a half, Break the Majority has been building up to this moment. Our field staff has been working hard to make sure we're successful on Nov. 6, but they need your help.
We can't do this without you, Friend. **Sign up to volunteer this before Election Day:**
[**https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ncdems/**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120399c/2fde7c66/49dfbc0c/15686bb2/2337299167/VEsF/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ncdems/")
Thanks for your continued support,
Sydney Watnick
Field Director
Break the Majority

name: Mara Boggs
subject: Manchin Will Launch "Take Me Home" Motorcycle Tour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
|
# Join Joe for the "Take Me Home" Motorcycle Ride
---
| _please visit www.joemanchinwv.com/takemehomeride for more information_
---
| We are bringing this campaign home in West Virginia style, along our Country Roads! Starting Sunday morning, U.S. Senator Joe Manchin will kick off his two-day "Take Me Home" motorcycle tour. Joe will make 12 stops to visit with West Virginians in the home stretch. All West Virginians are invited to participate. Riders are welcome to ride all, or any part, of the ride. If you don't ride, and you want to participate, you are welcome to join us at any of the stops. All of the stops are listed in the flyer below.
"From day one, this election has been about the people of West Virginia," said Senator Joe Manchin. "We are riding to celebrate every one of our freedoms on the ballot this year. There has never been a more important election for our state, it's time to take it home and stand up for West Virginia."
---

Paid for by Manchin for West Virginia
---

P.O. Box 5202
Charleston, WV 25361

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: early reports
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends, I hate to ask you for another donation, but it's important.

More than half of the total votes in our Nevada Senate race will be cast before Election Day, and right now, early reports show high Republican voter turnout.

That's why I'm reaching out: This race is going to come down to the wire, and we need to get every single voter we can to the polls. Every single day, we drain our bank account to nearly zero, doing all we can to turn out every Democrat we can - and we can't keep it up without your help.

So I need to ask: Can I count on you to pitch in $5, or whatever you can, right now? Our race is still within 1 point, so your support will be the difference between winning and losing on Election Day.

You can use this link: [**secure.actblue.com/contribute/cjs4jr**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4jr?refcode=jtk917-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)

Thank you. Your support means so much,

Jacky

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Four myths we must address.
body:
| | Christians need to know the answers.
---

| Peter, You don’t have to be involved in politics long to discover there are many who struggle to reconcile faith and politics. Our friend, Pastor J.D. Greear breaks down [Four Myths About Christian Political Engagement](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNJZ_BWixTgWQoBFQN5Eb8ZDgP-hu6or3DUHh-CYQ_tZuW5LqMxPQKElnZvCONT10VH-BRnXJvHh9YZLfY585y8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181102news01&n=2) you are going to want to read! _“The question of politics has always been a tough one for me. On one hand, I often feel guilty for not doing** _more_**. Doesn’t obedience require standing up for truth and justice? But on the other hand, as a Christian leader, I often feel guilty for having said ** _too much_**. Am I putting too many obstacles in the way of the gospel?”_
–Pastor J.D. Greear We encourage you to take a few minutes to [read this article](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNJZ_BWixTgWQoBFQN5Eb8ZDgP-hu6or3DUHh-CYQ_tZuW5LqMxPQKElnZvCONT10VH-BRnXJvHh9YZLfY585y8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181102news01&n=3) before the elections on Tuesday and share it with your friends. It’s so important that we as Christians address these four myths! [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNJZ_BWixTgWQoBFQN5Eb8ZDgP-hu6or3DUHh-CYQ_tZuW5LqMxPQKElnZvCONT10VH-BRnXJvHh9YZLfY585y8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181102news01&n=4)
