name: Team Menendez
subject: 4 days out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
**There are just 4 DAYS left before the election!**

[**We need your help to prevent Bob Hugin from buying this election before it's too late. Donate to Bob Menendez >>>**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c0b/3af3c5d/38458d5c/4ec36626/2479460988/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-finalpush?gpsid=5_73_4906&refcode=em18_181101_4Days_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181101_4Days_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+We+need+your+help+to+prevent+Bob+Hugin+f")
**[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c0b/3af3c5d/38458d5c/4ec36619/2479460988/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-finalpush?gpsid=5_73_4906&refcode=em18_181101_4Days_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181101_4Days_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+DONATE")** Friend,

Bob Hugin knows he can't win this race on his own record -- that's why he's spent over $30 million to mislead voters.

He is a greedy drug company CEO who price gouged cancer patients trying to buy life-saving medicine. His past is littered with misogynistic and anti-gay statements like those spoken while he was at Princeton and he continues to fall in line with his buddy, Donald Trump, despite the President's reckless and divisive behavior.

Now, with just 4 days until Election Day, it has never mattered more that you stand up for the future of New Jersey and support a proven leader like Senator Bob Menendez.

[**If you are ready to stand up to Trump and Bob Hugin, help us finish this race strong by chipping in $5 or more today.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c0b/3af3c5d/38458d5c/4ec36618/2479460988/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-finalpush?gpsid=5_73_4906&refcode=em18_181101_4Days_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181101_4Days_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+If+you+are+ready+to+stand+up+to+Trump+an")

Hugin is focused on helping his mega-rich friends, including the president, rather than focusing on the issues that matter to you.

Bob Menendez has always been a champion for the issues that New Jerseyans face every day - affordable healthcare, women's rights, and LGBTQ equality. Middle-class families need real leadership, not more of the Trump/Hugin agenda that only benefits the top.

We know we can't match Hugin's personal fortune that he continues to pump into this race, but that isn't stopping Senator Menendez from fighting every day.

[**Together we can defeat Hugin and keep a proven leader and New Jersey champion in Congress fighting for us. Chip in $5 or more today and together we can win this for New Jersey.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c0b/3af3c5d/38458d5c/4ec3661b/2479460988/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-finalpush?gpsid=5_73_4906&refcode=em18_181101_4Days_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181101_4Days_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=4+-+Together+we+can+defeat+Hugin+and+keep+a+")

Thank you,

Team Menendez
**[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c0b/3af3c5d/38458d5c/4ec3661a/2479460988/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-finalpush?gpsid=5_73_4906&refcode=em18_181101_4Days_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181101_4Days_fnd_gq_cust__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=5+-+Donate")**

name: Flip the Senate
subject: 🚨🚨🚨 Don't forget Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7c4f/51dbcc2a/1647e422/3ac4dcb/3866717499/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Important update for you, team:

As we head into the final weekend of this campaign, the Senate race in Pennsylvania is one to watch. Republican Congressman Lou Barletta made his **_biggest ad buy yet_** last month and the **NRA** just dropped tens of thousands of dollars to support him, so we need to be prepared to defend Bob Casey if we want to take back the Senate in November.

There are only _four days_ left to fight back against these smears from the far-right. Barletta loves to attack Bob's record of fighting for Pennsylvania families, but we know the truth. Bob is a fighter for middle-class Pennsylvanians -- he protects our health care, defends Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security and is a firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the Trump agenda.

**It's time to set the record straight. Donors are standing by and ready to match up to $30,000 in donations from this grassroots network through this weekend -- please rush a $5 donation (becomes $10) to help spread Bob's message right now.** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. clean_body: "" Important update for you, team: As we head into the final weekend of this campaign, the Senate race in Pennsylvania is one to watch. Republican Congressman Lou Barletta made his biggest ad buy yet last month and the NRA just dropped tens of thousands of dollars to support him, so we need to be prepared to defend Bob Casey if we want to take back the Senate in November. There are only four days left to fight back against these smears from the far-right. Barletta loves to attack Bob's record of fighting for Pennsylvania families, but we know the truth. Bob is a fighter for middle-class Pennsylvanians -- he protects our health care, defends Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security and is a firewall against the most dangerous pieces of the Trump agenda. It's time to set the record straight. Donors are standing by and ready to match up to $30,000 in donations from this grassroots network through this weekend -- please rush a $5 donation (becomes $10) to help spread Bob's message right now. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks. | Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Zack Malitz, betofortexas.com
subject: The. Field. Margin.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

We have an edge. It’s scientifically proven to work. And we’re doing it
bigger than any campaign in Texas history.

I’m talking about our historic field program. Our amazing volunteers are on pace to
knock two million doors in our GOTV effort. And these conversations are
working: voter turnout is at an all-time high.

Beto believes in the power of people talking to people. That’s why he’s
invested significant campaign resources into organizing. Beto has hundreds
of field staff, college fellows and thousands of volunteers! It takes a
lot of money, and it’s why we are asking again:

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181102&t=1019&akid=23650%2E444211%2Eizepkf ]Can you chip in your first
donation of
$3
to expand our field effort to turn out every single Beto supporter in
these last few days? We’ve set a $3.5 million goal to ensure we reach
every voter.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181102&t=1020&akid=23650%2E444211%2Eizepkf ]Contribute
$3
»

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181102&t=1021&akid=23650%2E444211%2Eizepkf ]Beto for Texas

In a close election like this one, a good field program with dedicated
volunteers can close the gap a handful of percentage points (the so-called
“field margin”) by turning out additional voters.

There’s been a lot of attention on Beto’s fundraising. Most candidates
spend their campaign money on consultants who tell them what to say and
how to act. But Beto is doing something radically different: spending
money to get as many Texans talking to Texans as humanly possible.

“Though we haven’t taken a dime from a single PAC, we’ve been very
fortunate the number of Texans who stepped forward -- five, ten, 15
bucks at a time -- they are funding the largest field program that
you’ve ever seen in this state.”
- BETO O'ROURKE

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181102&t=1022&akid=23650%2E444211%2Eizepkf ]Add your
first contribution of
$3
or more now to help us fund our historic field effort -- more than 800
staff on the ground and tens of thousands of amazing volunteers.

From the very beginning, we’ve always believed that a people-powered
campaign was the only vehicle that would assure us victory. Four days out,
I believe that now more than ever.

Onward,

Zack Malitz
Field Director
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181102&t=1023&akid=23650%2E444211%2Eizepkf ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181102footer&t=1024&akid=23650%2E444211%2Eizepkf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=23650%2E444211%2Eizepkf

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: This race transcends partisan politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
"It goes beyond politics now," former Republican Senator John Warner says. "I'm a Republican, I'll finish a Republican as I cruise through my 91st year. But you've got to put the nation's interests and the state's interests ahead of politics."
| | Peter, VA-7 is a historically Republican district. But it is now a toss-up race because our campaign's message of building consensus is resonating with Virginians of both political parties. **That includes former Republican Senator John Warner,** Peter, who I am very proud to announce has endorsed our campaign. **" It goes beyond politics now,"** Sen. Warner told _NBC News,_ explaining his decision. "I'm a Republican, I'll finish a Republican as I cruise through my 91st year.**But you 've got to put the nation's interests and the state's interests ahead of politics."** I'm honored to have earned Sen. Warner's support, Peter, because he is right -- the issues at stake in this election transcend partisan politics. We're building a broad coalition to chart a positive path forward for Central Virginia. If we keep reaching out to our neighbors, we will win this race in four days, [**so please consider making a donation to our campaign, so we can make our final weekend of voter outreach a success.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/K_ALV-gZQ1XCDsErHoNJRUEmVlUQv2sgA1wogrbq9S0=/w_jUvAXk_sEophveJ-Hz4KkTm9gaq5WQ8_ttw8Vxz7U=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.02_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/K_ALV-gZQ1XCDsErHoNJRUEmVlUQv2sgA1wogrbq9S0=/w_jUvAXk_sEophveJ-Hz4KkTm9gaq5WQ8_ttw8Vxz7U=?refcode=em_fr_2018.11.02_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/K_ALV-gZQ1XCDsErHoNJRUEmVlUQv2sgA1wogrbq9S0=/w_jUvAXk_sEophveJ-Hz4KkTm9gaq5WQ8_ttw8Vxz7U=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/K_ALV-gZQ1XCDsErHoNJRUEmVlUQv2sgA1wogrbq9S0=/lDi711DjPTSzqkNRw6cVfo0T8z6Fg_di51c5-5ElwxU=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---

Glen Allen VA 23058 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Vote Tuesday!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| Friend,
---
| **With just 4 days left until Election Day, we wanted to remind you of how crucial it is to get out and vote on November 6th!** The choice in this election is clear, but we need your support and enthusiasm to make it happen! There is so much more work to do to grow our economy, make Vermont more affordable, and protect the most vulnerable. It’s critical no one sits this election out, or takes it for granted -- we certainly won’t! **So please, remember to vote! And remind and encourage your friends and family to vote too -- because our future depends on it!** Sincerely, Team Scott P.S. - If you have voted by absentee ballot, please remember to turn in your ballots to your Town Clerk before Tuesday. [Click here to learn more about same-day voter registration, accessibility for disabled voters, and where your local polling place is.](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0309711400&e=19cebfe173)

clean_body: It was an honor to once again welcome President Trump to Missouri yesterday. Listening to him speak to the people of our state reminded me just how crucial it is to win this race, and President made it clear - WE HAVE TO WIN THIS RACE. You can see for yourself at the video below. Senator McCaskill talks a good game about being bipartisan, but her record tells another story - she works for Chuck Schumer, not for us. If President Trump is going to continue improving the lives of all Missourians, he’s going to need supportive and hardworking Senators at his side. If you want to help me bring back the results that Washington needs, . Election Day is NEXT WEEK - don't wake up on November 7th and wonder what might have been. I'm grateful to President Trump for visiting Missouri, and to the hardworking Missourians who believe in a better future for our state. Let's win this. Josh Hawley Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

Friend, the defining moment of our entire campaign is just 4 days away.

Everything we have worked so hard for this entire year is coming down to the results next Tuesday and friend, we have to work as hard as ever.

We have no time to rest – it's the final sprint!

We’re out in the field. I’m touring our great state. We’ve got ads on the radio, on TV, and on digital. We’re doing everything we can to share our message with every single voter here in Wisconsin because NOW is when it matters most.

And to keep up our hard work, I really need your help. [**Can you chip in $5, $25, or even $50 today to keep us going?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0e91ce68fdc94901a951247e0b40cb67&_e=yJvgN0HI6cURU9O2e8XWp5zeJC1Z4k5A3kLSqvpYMxmoyTCbJgV7lmoAnMK0vx4DAB406I5N5GefMWOP05bfoOQyl58K2wBUrpNq4WbI53bk2PyABnrCmMdO0fOGJgMse5QbtasTqcUK7Z3uBIqJfp_zGfTsULtc3ziU4tXkNx6wC9HU7HnZ36-8J7hTi31sWGWT8ovGB9RooQYwOAfSmtUFFQrbtT4EswrkbrB-HkNBPFcJFFSBiyKTzAq8XdgIFNbzTLMPIH9JpwSzK4CUmgPLprxnDqjvMExbyaPz_VNuE_jpRXI-b02QS3yK3wJqn-v_2oHOD0vKQcz9CaHwkIG2kXCzZ1tavHnaKKCheL3GFRFkmblrkHmG0kwc8yOftTTRKYuaCjIhwiCIZvFKmu3TVzUOpzU-yxgoavElofg%3D)

When we’re down to the wire like this, any amount helps fight back against my opponent to make sure we defeat Tammy Baldwin in November and keep the Republican majority!

If we give up now and we don’t win, everything we have worked for will be for nothing.

I hope you can help us out today and chip in $25 to share our message before Tuesday: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0e91ce68fdc94901a951247e0b40cb67&_e=yJvgN0HI6cURU9O2e8XWp5zeJC1Z4k5A3kLSqvpYMxmcdGo4f9QYEYPDt-6BsBboK5wiwy_qkAhJ2HyYivv46-Ov2RdiJAPZ1CVndwnUADGsttNYimdgwbCFMGpIULhgjmT0Ck8r7m2n4Yl1KfIrTRBfn3Ed05_BYkdVJe6qbPZhmKfGkaU1l8CsNS4b7dRUHPJbtDpBNEoRxK4WRfrwaXoyTSyyNdMIzehHo9TwFCkUziGn2ouueRkoF07ebmQOo24hYwFmPqhe0fsnEPhyIHaWH44Rkx-fWXA_JtsRvhmgHImlb2es22HrPNm6lv3JEHnRHDZcPSA9yJKK9ZDeSKqOnMZ_asCgyW1b3bCMZwpv6RS7XRNENI5LUBjPiCU4KRMJb92R_2BdrvWvksYiuGVPsUXj2qb2By1XMavvY7Q%3D)**

Leah

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0e91ce68fdc94901a951247e0b40cb67&_e=TmnlskLp0kvLpK_LsaThZ2pApDq18eWGHty7UUCh1YsK7iVkIwfMjTd316x8G57Oun2T4HbwgxqGkHWWuaHCx8QzOXkVyw86RT1wVckHZJbS58e0c8idZQQ_js2XEZqSPRXb2oj8hGk8KRmixY80I-IeV2BYUM9J5_R3Xy01snGgcSjJYUsPT9lDcmt2C6hKCfAtXh3WJLFQZqVyw8fRAha7FI131AAo295Zyc-670MjCw2HY5-nN638OEtSXhkB). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0e91ce68fdc94901a951247e0b40cb67&_e=yJvgN0HI6cURU9O2e8XWp4AO36AKSF_TGgojEzeIALa_yFvgHJfoznShj_aelLw7n-FkHghsFblJha45QYI44AA8GhD2z3N7TJilG0PHNYYnbHv41GfkasGpIRbjM_SSVjX9csRFWAevsYd5n_Ae6fFWAYsI_XK75QN2ce776i5bmec3QzEgxUb1lEkVXibVVJ11zLJvyAveUgrJyM2qubMsX-mDSvkM_KE3Xxhm4ctcDaFt2JdQHTcKTI0u7eBzXu0HFeUTWaUl6fiA1eG-5laT7IasOvDlHZpKZwnAOcpYYNhsJiQ8np9k0UTR66dCBZxfQ46H2mnSOxFtkb20GihJ35MwkD98WMJ2WeZvavlH096rfY_yRmZE-yl_fl_K) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0e91ce68fdc94901a951247e0b40cb67&_e=yJvgN0HI6cURU9O2e8XWp4AO36AKSF_TGgojEzeIALaaNVEoUmjs8mrUeHPO_HJvaPEEH0kbVzDYuKGZT5H0Nv9zJtzcQUqkTZFx8eazJmjGq0k32bAQZ15FHlifvTqxz--cKcReMfdHKv9tAEtpSC7yoQVaZUN0jtLTiEN8Ud_V5Kun5GgyQzf5MAjETBKjqYCXmk97btvOhPSIuw-XkOCrr7vg0xBfQWvFCKFeGCalmIH5rAh1FYxbE2z8C-tHrk3GIqRIGEh5eRpf4MIyfn7dy0TXD6j6edI-qemCObfumKR9vE8EicSknNcoIJyXN4mPWRs80Q9P7JH7wF8j6ZdYUq91wXk8q62oT5I727qXwwYY_0J5Az7m5D9VtAgo) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0e91ce68fdc94901a951247e0b40cb67&_e=yJvgN0HI6cURU9O2e8XWpxX75JPGKplsITk8i7bfTIZ9folTYaXQ0CIw3UzRxIolT_Ha94fBvFTMc5bRA2WFFkzE0E-Pe6fhF21wkS3JKco7K4LWNgXzwaaEHH_GAfBkCJWPn3q_bkYQthhU5FANNncaV4TRlSm_0wMgD6pV2uWKDd7gfyruCH1amDBzzdWaP-IE3j9S8Ww0ciwcgjm8grNHM57eMOEogPMer-BBD66oAeEW_m2DcCLuzpQSJBeTGWoputWuz7JMSfHFwbVxaA%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0e91ce68fdc94901a951247e0b40cb67&_e=yJvgN0HI6cURU9O2e8XWp-_VZ4G57ZCPFSXb9_wGa-cEqhJlCieEQqmUD3BwEq7e3gk-uYK6yu3irD7OdEd2TsELMmpcVzUpWOyiY-ORs9G5sJ4_rUqPjE0Lv7sf7OdvIB2w8rXs_hYcAprD6AMH2KmTaDxGSh0yWQcIi4-MWdVyhTIQUH-j_JKO8vb470z0L42LWA55jURtMdkby1XX2EQVH_gmWHd4ToFAhCCEzFyeMps0s2HBJ_RcOuyK-ghTwJX6FaFsXbHMvnz28DswIw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0e91ce68fdc94901a951247e0b40cb67&_e=yJvgN0HI6cURU9O2e8XWpxFyymZwRFPX8VL2S0guknhE3B6k60hd2CKICiNYV9MiG5nyjxYzv35mCizgJpm_P40j3VzlEpqhSquMZdpTNxnWX6LVHi59wgfXjpUu8-t-LlXZJa54j2lKU88QPyGR5gW-1jjNR7CBq7Zst6MBAB-GPv_gSgCeMJWvTR-ZJ5pzd-_P_humnUztyRDw4FomB628vZ3h5rt8qbbVbw6jNbvFUgN2VgkBcbTIs1EtOHVW0m8HlOi9AToKC794u0s_0A%3D%3D) feed. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0e91ce68fdc94901a951247e0b40cb67&_e=yJvgN0HI6cURU9O2e8XWp4AO36AKSF_TGgojEzeIALZoHqmXP0qTBNDIsccxavTRUTNV3DtmVQ1IyXpSl-mOQzjVl-3m7XTeNPbZ5gchpBnBfOi-G6z-1_SuLREgc_6Tt3cVFoGPN-_IPW-xLQOeFQGaVF91nDXWgxLY01bUv1k6tTGBOgckoz9beC5odQLJX1KNhE4TyZ5QYRab2YSsnFxlJTOP1NK8LHwAAiKQ3u2fdnrW5MrifRvUC-bee9Ftz7aV6ufxWItZWiR0IUTUXPCMmnjUMsrzXtRQmTVIybZlwtYI1bcWyynsoJXpzqSj97UySEN_Zw-5hUlm1cXiAumTwD34f5UUKDyCdCSr4wYYUIevX6hIo5qyNVIQbxMewUBioyfkL6V6_W1ilg6ssg%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. clean_body: We have no time to rest – it's the final sprint! We’re out in the field. I’m touring our great state. We’ve got ads on the radio, on TV, and...... ** ELECTION COUNTDOWN Goal: $100,000 DEADLINE: 4 Days | Friend, the defining moment of our entire campaign is just 4 days away. Everything we have worked so hard for this entire year is coming down to the results next Tuesday and friend, we have to work as hard as ever. We have no time to rest – it's the final sprint! We’re out in the field. I’m touring our great state. We’ve got ads on the radio, on TV, and on digital. We’re doing everything we can to share our message with every single voter here in Wisconsin because NOW is when it matters most. And to keep up our hard work, I really need your help. When we’re down to the wire like this, any amount helps fight back against my opponent to make sure we defeat Tammy Baldwin in November and keep the Republican majority! If we give up now and we don’t win, everything we have worked for will be for nothing. I hope you can help us out today and chip in $25 to share our message before Tuesday: Thanks, friend. Your support means the world to me. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Tim Walz
subject: Did I make you proud?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Friend --

I just left the stage and I hope I made you proud during tonight's final debate.

The contrast was clear.

In this state we don't fear the future, we create the future. Let's move forward as One Minnesota -- with affordable health care for all, great public schools, and high-quality roads, bridges, and transit.

There are just four days left.

**[Will you rush a contribution to our Get Out The Vote Action Fund right now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/MnTsa2-gKvRAtNZRcFYQsCnENCbNH6VmR7FBoTfGfM0=/i4VKHKYXZHRJlSpJhdtmI-le2jCtdOlPTFnFbSxvfAw=?refcode=20181102.3nd&amount=10)**

I'm honored to stand with you, and I'm grateful to know that you have my back.

Let's win this.

Tim | | ******[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MnTsa2-gKvRAtNZRcFYQsCnENCbNH6VmR7FBoTfGfM0=/i4VKHKYXZHRJlSpJhdtmI-le2jCtdOlPTFnFbSxvfAw=?refcode=20181102.3nd&amount=10
)******

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: Ted Cruz and Steve King
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

We got some disturbing news this week: Ted Cruz called Steve King --
Cruz's former Presidential Campaign Co-Chair -- to double down on his
support of the Congressman. This news comes as bipartisan leaders across
the country are united in condemning King’s divisive and hateful rhetoric.

Even the chairman of the National Republican Congressional Committee, Rep.
Steve Stivers, took extraordinary steps to publicly condemn King, saying
“Congressman Steve King’s recent comments, actions, and retweets are
completely inappropriate. We must stand up against white supremacy and
hate in all forms, and I strongly condemn this behavior.”

I’ll be blunt: it should be easy to condemn Steve King. But for some
reason, Cruz can’t bring himself to do it.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181102&t=1019&akid=23651%2E444211%2EOPp29D ]Ted Cruz is not fit to lead Texas, and right now we have an
opportunity to unseat him for good. I’m calling on you to rush
a
$3
contribution to Beto’s campaign today and help us defeat Ted Cruz in just
four short days.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181102&t=1020&akid=23651%2E444211%2EOPp29D ]Contribute
$3
»

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181102&t=1021&akid=23651%2E444211%2EOPp29D ]Beto for Texas

Not only is Cruz refusing to join members of both parties in condemning
his former presidential co-chair’s actions but he’s doubling down on his
support.

Texas deserves better. We deserve a senator who will fight for and
represent everyone in our state instead of fueling divisions at a time
when we need to come together.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181102&t=1022&akid=23651%2E444211%2EOPp29D ]Can you pitch in a
contribution of
$3
or more to Beto's campaign today? With just four days to go until the
election, the polls are closing and millions of new Texans are voting --
let's send Beto to fight for our values in the Senate.

Thanks for standing on the right side of history.

Talk soon,

Chris Evans
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/15673?refcode=ema20181102&t=1023&akid=23651%2E444211%2EOPp29D ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181102footer&t=1024&akid=23651%2E444211%2EOPp29D

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=23651%2E444211%2EOPp29D

subject: please, friend

body:
Early vote returns suggest that Republicans have a real shot of unseating me, and my team is feeling a bit anxious -- but more than anything, we are feeling determined, and I hope you do too.
_I need your help right now, friend._ Early vote returns suggest that Republicans have a real shot of unseating me, and my team is feeling a bit anxious -- but more than anything, we are feeling determined, and I hope you are too. We must win this race so I can continue standing up for Arizona families, and we must win this race so Democrats can take back the House. AZ-01 is a perennial battleground district, and Republicans are desperate to unseat Tom, which is why Super PACs are boosting right-wing Wendy Rogers. So we were always preparing for this thing to come down to the wire.

But to pull out a win -- and take back the House! -- we have to be firing on all cylinders all the way until the polls close on November 6th. name: Heather Gautney, Our Revolution
subject: Friends, we can't do this without you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
We're in the final stretch of what could be a critical tipping point for Our Revolution. Look at how far we've come because of you:
#
Friends,
**We're in the final stretch of what could be a critical tipping point for Our Revolution.** Look at how far we've come because of you:
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a7e1/bed43eb/8d17c8a8/75fc3963/522575457/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-numbers?refcode=em181102&noskip=true&recurring=true")
These numbers don't even come close to capturing the mind-blowing _momentum_ we have going into this final stretch of the election.
**[The truth is, this movement doesn't exist without people like you, whose daily actions, calls, texts, door knocks, and donations fuel the progressive agenda that will shape the future of politics. Our work is critical to the results of the midterms, and will not slow down after the election. Can you join the growing ranks of people making a small regular contribution to Our Revolution?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a7e1/bed43eb/8d17c8a8/75fc3963/522575457/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-numbers?refcode=em181102&noskip=true&recurring=true")**

name: Jake Fons
subject: One last time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This is my last email to you, friend.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-november?refcode=rtw_20181102PM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, I have just one more ask of you before we head into our final get out the vote push this weekend. We're running out of time and there's just no way to hit our final November goal without your help. And there's too much at stake to sit back -- Democrats taking back the Senate, the future of health care, and stopping Trump's extreme agenda. I have seen this team step up time and time again when we've needed it. Taken on super PAC attacks, surpassed goals to build a bigger and stronger grassroots campaign than anyone thought possible -- now I'm asking you personally to do it one more time. **[This is my last email to you before Election Day -- can you please pitch in everything you can before midnight so we finish this campaign strong for Tina? Minnesota needs a Senator who will fight for our progressive values.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: Can I count on you to volunteer?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
The last weekend to help us win. |
---
|
---
| Friend, I've never seen grassroots energy like this across Arizona.

Thousands of Arizonans have volunteered to help us get out the vote before Election Day, but if we're going to hit our historic voter contact goals, we're going to need even more help from people like you.

With polls showing this race is a dead heat, the number of doors we knock and calls we make this weekend could be the difference between victory and defeat.

**[Friend, can I count on you to volunteer during the last weekend of our campaign? It's the most important way right now to help us win.](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d075c/45aebd3c/51fc1227/2caa4fa1/547880902/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVklUMDFGVUVoUFRrVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWUFEwTlZVRUZVU1U5T0pTVT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFZCTVQxbEZVaVVsIjoiIn0=/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/sinemaforarizona/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMEFriend+can+I+count+on+you+to+vo&utm_campaign=KS_EM_VOL_BAZ_181102_6_1&source=KS_EM_VOL_BAZ_181102_6_1&refcode=KS_EM_VOL_BAZ_181102_6_1")**

**[Sign up to volunteer->](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d075c/45aebd3c/51fc1227/2caa4fa2/547880902/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVklUMDFGVUVoUFRrVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWUFEwTlZVRUZVU1U5T0pTVT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFZCTVQxbEZVaVVsIjoiIn0=/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/sinemaforarizona/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+Sign+up+to+volunteer+rarr&utm_campaign=KS_EM_VOL_BAZ_181102_6_1&source=KS_EM_VOL_BAZ_181102_6_1&refcode=KS_EM_VOL_BAZ_181102_6_1")**
In a race this close, every last door knock, phone call, or text could be the difference.

That's why thousands of Arizonans are volunteering to talk to their friends and neighbors in these final days of our campaign. **We need you to join them for us to hit our voter contact goals and win on Tuesday.**

**[Please sign up now to help get out the vote in the crucial final stretch before Election Day.](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d075c/45aebd3c/51fc1227/2caa4fa3/547880902/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVklUMDFGVUVoUFRrVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWUFEwTlZVRUZVU1U5T0pTVT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFZCTVQxbEZVaVVsIjoiIn0=/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/sinemaforarizona/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-+Please+sign+up+now+to+help+get+out+the+v&utm_campaign=KS_EM_VOL_BAZ_181102_6_1&source=KS_EM_VOL_BAZ_181102_6_1&refcode=KS_EM_VOL_BAZ_181102_6_1")**

Thanks so much. Now let's go win!
Kyrsten

subject: WOW.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7c57/51dbcc2a/16b607f8/3acbc7e/526078106/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")

I'm totally floored by this response, really!

Since we sent this email this morning, it has raised about DOUBLE the average. Folks across the Commonwealth and the nation are invested in protecting Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat, and everyone here at Casey Campaign HQ is really grateful.

**We're so close to meeting our $30,000 match goal -- can you chip in $5 (becomes $10) to support Bob today?**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/MATCH](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181102_fr3_nd_s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks!

Cate

Cate Domino
Digital Director
Bob Casey for Senate \---------- Forwarded message ----------

Here's what you need to know, team:
1. Democrats have no chance of taking back the Senate majority if Bob Casey loses in Pennsylvania.

2. Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, raised **$221,066** more than Bob in the first half of October, so now Pennsylvania Democrats are playing catch-up to protect this seat.

3. A group of donors are willing to match up to $30,000 in donations from this grassroots network by midnight tonight.

**It's going to take each and every one of us to protect Bob, preserve Democrats' chance to take back the Senate and show President Trump's allies where we stand. During this final push, even $5 (becomes $10) goes a long way.** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. name: Kimberly Padilla
subject: I'm sorry, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | I'm sorry. I know this is the start of your weekend, and I don't want to bug you. But have you seen the poll released today? **OH US-SEN (Gravis): US Sen Sherrod Brown (D) 46%, Jim Renacci (R) 37%** As Sherrod's finance director, I'm also worried because we're super behind on fundraising and need funds to boost Sherrod's message around Ohio. [**That means we need to raise $15,000 by midnight.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd21/4462dc26/76ac2e26/201f1b92/1012166188/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAycG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181102pm?refcode=sbe181102pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Hitting this goal is critical. We don't want a single-digit poll to turn into a loss for Sherrod. Unfortunately, if we don't step up, that might be the reality. [**You can help get us back on track Peter, and make sure we have the resources we need in the final days of this race. If 106 people give before midnight, we can keep our ads up and our GOTV efforts strong.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd21/4462dc26/76ac2e26/201f1b92/1012166188/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAycG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181102pm?refcode=sbe181102pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") [**Be one of them >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd21/4462dc26/76ac2e26/201f1b92/1012166188/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAycG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181102pm?refcode=sbe181102pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Thanks! Kimberly Kimberly Padilla
Finance Director
Friends of Sherrod Brown _\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Sherrod Brown
Subject: we're polling in single digits against my opponent..._ |
---
Four days from Election Day and far too many people have it in their heads that this race is done.
Here's the reality -- **this race is within single digits.** According to a new poll, we're losing ground in the final days. And President Trump will be here in person, again, the day before the election.
That's why, Peter, [**I'm asking you to give. We need another $15,000 by midnight if we want any chance to keep our GOTV efforts going.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd21/4462dc26/76ac2e26/201f1b92/1012166188/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAycG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181102pm?refcode=sbe181102pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
**[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd21/4462dc26/76ac2e26/201f1b91/1012166188/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAycG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181102pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181102pm_m_5&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd21/4462dc26/76ac2e26/201f1b91/1012166188/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAycG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181102pm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181102pm_m_10&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd21/4462dc26/76ac2e26/201f1b91/1012166188/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAycG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181102pm?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181102pm_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd21/4462dc26/76ac2e26/201f1b92/1012166188/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAycG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181102pm?refcode=sbe181102pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
My job is fighting like hell for Ohio in the Senate -- and I love every minute of it. I want to keep up that work. But first, we need to win on Tuesday.
This is a single-digit race. [**Don't wait. Chip in what you can. Help us bring this campaign over the finish line.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffd21/4462dc26/76ac2e26/201f1b92/1012166188/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMTAycG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181102pm?refcode=sbe181102pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|

name: Team Manchin
subject: Join us for the "Take Me Home" Motorcycle Ride!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Manchin for West Virginia
body:
Joe is riding his motorcycle across WV Nov. 4-5 |
---
[](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/49818321/2efbf85c/61766138/4c9044ab/3105035601/VEsH/ "http://www.joemanchinwv.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em11022018logan&source=em11022018logan")

Friend, We are bringing this campaign home in West Virginia style, along our Country Roads! Starting Sunday morning, U.S. Senator Joe Manchin will kick off his two-day "Take Me Home" motorcycle tour. Joe will make 12 stops to visit with West Virginians in the home stretch. All West Virginians are invited to participate. Riders are welcome to ride all, or any part, of the ride. If you don't ride, and you want to participate, you are welcome to join us at any of the stops. All of the stops are listed in the flyer below. "From day one, this election has been about the people of West Virginia," said Senator Joe Manchin. "We are riding to celebrate every one of our freedoms on the ballot this year. There has never been a more important election for our state, it's time to take it home and stand up for West Virginia." Visit [JoeManchinWV.com/TakeMeHomeRide](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/49818321/2efbf85c/61766138/4c9044aa/3105035601/VEsE/ "https://JoeManchinWV.com/TakeMeHomeRide?utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=2+-+JoeManchinWVcomTakeMeHomeRide&utm_campaign=em11022018logan&source=em11022018logan") for more information!

[Contribute Now](https://secure.joemanchinwv.com/page/m/49818321/2efbf85c/61766138/4c9044a9/3105035601/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jm-event?refcode=100618event&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=manchin&utm_content=3+-+Contribute+Now&utm_campaign=em11022018logan&source=em11022018logan")
|

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Quick note for you, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, I don't want to take too much of your time tonight.

Tomorrow, volunteers are heading out for the final weekend before the election to talk to folks in their community about the things we care about, and how we can use our voices and vote on Tuesday.

**So I have one last goal to ask for your help on.[My team tells me we need $40,000 to reach this final goal to get us through to Election Night, to go strong through the finish line and close up shop with big wins. Some of these House races are as close as they come! And we need to be prepared for anything - including potential recounts.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10be/3e0906/752cf964/3e3763de/3257414790/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181102_3_FR_TK_gotv-tomorrow-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+My+team+tells+me+we+need+40000+to+reach+&utm_campaign=20181102_3_FR_TK_gotv-tomorrow-LDND&source=20181102_3_FR_TK_gotv-tomorrow-LDND")**

**The deadline is a date I 'm sure you know as well as I do: November 6th, at 7 p.m. when polls close in Virginia. Do you think you could chip in before then?** | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f10be/3e0906/752cf964/3e3763dd/3257414790/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-november?refcode=20181102_3_FR_TK_gotv-tomorrow-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20181102_3_FR_TK_gotv-tomorrow-LDND&source=20181102_3_FR_TK_gotv-tomorrow-LDND")
---
Thanks for reading, Derek. Your support, and your faith in me, means the world.

_Tim_
